stories.title: Cubs 2, Braves 0 — Happ HR, Ben Brown Shines, Palencia Saves It

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Ben Brown: 4 IP, 1 H, SEVEN strikeouts.
Ian Happ: 424-ft bomb off the Chop House.
Palencia: Save No. 3 in the 9th.

Cubs 2, Braves 0. Four-game skid? OVER.

Now 28-16. Crosstown Classic starts tonight.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Palencia is BACK — and He Looked Like a Closer

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Palencia is BACK — and he looked like a closer.

Two Ks in the 9th. Save No. 3. The man averaged 100.4 mph in his Iowa rehab and is now locking down Cubs games again. 💪

Rotation's full of holes. At least the bullpen's whole.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

stories.title: Ben Brown's Emergence — Rotation's Answer to the Injury Crisis

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Ben Brown now has TWO consecutive starts.

In his second turn: 4 innings, 1 hit, SEVEN strikeouts, 0 runs.

With Horton out until 2027, Steele post-All-Star, Boyd 6 weeks gone — Brown isn't a fill-in. He's the answer.

#Cubs #GoCubs #ChicagoCubs

stories.title: SP Trade Urgency — This Isn't Deadline Talk, It's Triage

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Boyd out 6 weeks. Steele till August. Horton until 2027.

The trade deadline is August 3 — but this isn't deadline talk. This is triage.

Peralta or Alcantara aren't luxury options right now. They're survival.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Kevin Alcántara — Tying for MiLB HR Lead with 14 Bombs

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:

The 23-year-old Iowa Cubs CF has 14 homers in 2026 — at 6-foot-6, the lift he generates is something else. 🔥

The Cubs' rotation is depleted. A bat this big can't stay in Iowa forever.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubsBaseball
